TestCase z33Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_b = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: multiply each element of b by 2
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        follow_case.b[i] *= 2;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
